en: Mine I Was terrible at chemistry
I'm more of a humanities guy. How did you find me? We should talk about that
ja: お姉さん大丈夫だった？ちょっと不安定に見えたけど。
zhTW: 你姐姐還好嗎？她看起來有點緊繃。
vi: Chi gai ban on chu? Co ay co ve hoi cang thang.

en: So it should be much much harder for people to track you down
ko: 사람들이 너를 추적하기는 훨씬 더 어려워야 해.

en: My PI charged me for three hours. So I seriously doubt took him more than one
So this is what black man Walter I'm your lawyer
ja: ...僕が本気で君を愛してるってこと。
vi: ...la toi yeu ban den phat dien.

en: Anything you say to me is totally privileged. It's
ko: 내가 듣는 모든 것은 완전히 비밀이야.

en: I'm not in the shakedown racket. I'm a lawyer even drug dealers need lawyers, right? Especially drug dealers
ko: 나는 변호사야. 마약 밀매자도 변호사가 필요하잖아, 그렇지?
ja: 僕は弁護士だ。麻薬ディーラーだって弁護士は必要だろ？
zhTW: 我是律師。就算是毒販也需要律師，對吧？
vi: Toi la luat su. Ca ke buon ma tuy cung can luat su, dung khong?

en: So what you're just doing this out of the kindness of your heart. Oh
ko: 그럼, 너는 단순히 마음의 선의로 이걸 하는 거야?
ja: じゃあ、善意でやってるだけってこと？
zhTW: 所以你純粹是出於好心？
vi: Vay, anh lam dieu nay chi vi long tot thoi a?

en: Come on, have you seen my hourly rate? Oh
ja: 僕の時間給を見たことある？
vi: Anh da thay gia theo gio cua toi chua?

en: By the way, where do you keep the money is it in your mattress?
ja: ああ、ところで、お金はどこに保管してる？
vi: A, nhan tien, anh cat tien o dau?

en: Jelly jar buried in the side yard, huh?
ko: 아니면 옆마당에 묻힌 젤리병 안에 있어?
ja: 裏庭に埋めたジャムの瓶の中？
zhTW: 還是在後院埋的果醬罐裡？
vi: Hay trong lo thuy tinh chon o san ben hong?
